description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a dark, textured fabric upholstery. The sofa features a low-profile design with broad, rectangular seat and back cushions that appear plush and supportive. The backrest is continuous and slightly angled, with three large back cushions and two seat cushions forming the main seating area, while the chaise section extends to one side for lounging. The armrests are wide, flat, and integrated into the frame, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The legs are minimal and mostly recessed, with one visible metallic sled leg supporting the chaise section. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, lounges, or modern living rooms.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with dark, textured upholstery, broad cushions, and wide, integrated armrests. It features a low-profile, contemporary design with minimal, mostly hidden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's low profile, wide armrest, and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the length of the main seating section and the alignment of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the L-shaped sectional layout, cushion arrangement, and the chaise extension.
description_view_3: Opposite end view displaying the width of the sofa, the backrest, and the integrated armrest design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large back cushions and two wide seat cushions, all appearing loose and uniform in size, with a sectional layout including a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and rectangular armrests integrated into the sofa frame, matching the height of the backrest, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Minimalist legs, mostly recessed and hidden, with one visible metallic sled leg supporting the chaise section; legs are placed at corners and under the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight, and low backrest with three large, attached or semi-attached cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
